name: light adult wet dog food with chicken
description: your dog will love the taste of hill's science plan light adult dog food with its soft, smooth texture. it has the perfect balance of taste and nutrition for your dog. precisely balanced to deliver the appropriate amount of energy to support ideal body weight in adult dogs ages 1 – 6. key benefits: low calories & l-carnitine help promote ideal body weight satiety control. keeps your dog satisfied between meals omega-6s & vitamin e for beautiful skin & coat
